prompt: I'm working on an LLM app (Python, uses OpenAI) that extracts structured JSON from customer support emails. My test_extraction.py currently just runs the extraction and eyeballs the output. I want to convert this to proper eval-based tests. The extraction should produce a JSON object with fields: category, priority, and summary. How do I do this with pixie?
assertions: Recommends @observe or start_observation decorator on the extraction function
Shows how to attach expected_output to dataset items (echo piped to --expected-output flag or Python API)
Recommends ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom evaluator for structured output validation
Shows a complete test function using assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
Addresses how to handle partial pass criteria (ScoreThreshold)
